title: Tackle Chain
description: Player A tackles B; ball pops to C; Player D immediately tackles C. Rapid chained possession/knockdown events must be possible — cooldowns must not block the second valid tackle.

expected_outcomes.description: A tackles B; ball becomes loose and goes to C.
D can tackle C immediately — no cooldown prevents the second valid tackle.
After both tackles, ball is in a new loose or newly possessed state.

must_not_outcomes.description: A global or per-player tackle cooldown prevents D from immediately tackling C after A tackles B.

notes: The chain should be possible within a single second. This tests that cooldown systems are per-player (not global) and short enough to preserve EFT's pace.
